title: platform.role_bundle v1
description: Declarative per-role capability contract — the single primitive that tailors data, skills, agents, and connectors to a person's role, from single-site operator to enterprise. One bundle per role; org size is a mapping problem (single-site: owner bundle auto-assigned; multi-site: preset bundles; enterprise: external IdP groups map to bundles in shre-id). Consumers compile it into deterministic chokepoints — shre-id claim derivation, data-layer scoping (RLS / agent_data_grants), skill-catalog preflight, PDP risk ceiling, connector enablement, digest/alert cadence. The bundle is never a prompt-time hint: if a layer cannot enforce its dimension deterministically, it must not claim to consume this contract.

bundle.description: Kebab-case bundle id, unique platform-wide (e.g. store-manager). This is the value carried in identity claims.

version.description: Major version of the role-bundle contract this document conforms to.

label.description: Human-readable role name shown in UI and digests.

kpis.description: KPI slugs that frame this role's dashboards and digests (e.g. gross-margin, shrink, shift-variance).

framing.description: One-line voice/vocabulary hint for generated surfaces. The ONLY prompt-level field in the contract — everything else enforces deterministically.

entities.description: Data the role may read: shre.* v1 entity names (store, item, transaction, transaction_item, offer, customer) and/or capability verbs from provisioning manifests (e.g. pos.sales.read, analytics.read).

scope.description: Row-scope level. The concrete site/region ids come from the identity token (membership), never from the bundle — the bundle says HOW FAR the role sees, the token says WHICH rows that resolves to.

include.description: Skill/tool ids surfaced to this role's sessions. Effective catalog = include ∩ tenant's provisioned set; out-of-bundle skills are never registered into the session (absent, not refused).

exclude.description: Explicit denials. Exclude wins over include and over future additions to the tenant's provisioned set.

risk_ceiling.description: Highest risk tier this role may trigger without escalation. Vocabulary = the platform risk-tier ladder (shre-command-center packages/shared/src/risk-tier.ts; ranks read=0 < reversible=1 < approval_gated=2 < sensitive=3, fail closed: unclassified actions resolve to approval_gated). Actions above the ceiling route to the approval queue of a principal whose ceiling allows them — never silently execute, never silently drop.

enabled.description: Connector ids surfaced to this role. A bundle can only narrow the tenant's installed set — it cannot grant a connector the tenant lacks. Credentials remain tenant-scoped in the vault; the bundle controls surfacing only.

mode.description: Per-connector mode override, keyed by connector id. A connector enabled but absent from this map defaults to read_only (fail closed).

digest.description: Digest cadence slug consumed by the digest engine (e.g. weekly-owner, daily-shift-close). null = this role receives no digest.

alerts.description: Alert rule slugs routed to this role (e.g. stockout, drawer-variance, red-line).
